en: A SONG OF ASCENTS. "Greatly have they afflicted me from my youth"- let Israel now say-
zh: 願以色列說： “從我幼年以來，敵人就多次苦害我。

en: "Greatly have they afflicted me from my youth, yet they have not prevailed against me.
zh: 從我幼年以來，敵人雖然多次苦害我， 卻沒有勝過我。

en: The plowers plowed upon my back; they made long their furrows."
zh: 他們好像犁田的人犁在我的背上， 所犁的溝甚長。

en: The LORD is righteous; he has cut the cords of the wicked.
zh: 但耶和華是公義的， 他砍斷了惡人的繩索。”

en: May all who hate Zion be put to shame and turned backward!
zh: 願所有恨惡錫安的， 都蒙羞退後。

en: Let them be like the grass on the housetops, which withers before it grows up,
zh: 願他們像屋頂上的草， 尚未長大，就枯乾了；

en: with which the reaper does not fill his hand nor the binder of sheaves his arms,
zh: 收割的不夠一把， 捆禾的不夠滿懷。

en: nor do those who pass by say, "The blessing of the LORD be upon you! We bless you in the name of the LORD!"
zh: 過路的人也不說： “願耶和華所賜的福臨到你們； 我們奉耶和華的名祝福你們。”
